### 1.  Determining the maximum load for a single‑phase transformer

The maximum load occurs when the secondary voltage equals the rated voltage ( V₂ = V₂₍rated₎ ). Under this condition the load current is

\[
I_{2,\text{max}} = \frac{V_{2,\text{rated}}}{Z_{2,\text{eq}}}
\]

where \(Z_{2,\text{eq}}\) is the equivalent impedance referred to the secondary side.
